title: Software Update - DFU is not available during a call
scenario: DFU is blocked with a "Cannot update this device during a call" popup when the user attempts to update firmware while on an active call.
steps: Ensure the headset is on outdated firmware.
While on the call, navigate to the Software Update page in Device Settings.
expected: A popup appears with the message "Cannot update this device during a call". After tapping OK, the popup closes and the user is returned to the Software Update tab without starting the DFU.
